title: AP Updates Product Photos and Demo Videos - Functional Test Plan
author: QA Automation
overview: Functional testing of the product media management feature for Assistive Partners (APs) on the PwD Catalog Portal. This feature enables APs to update, replace, and manage product images (primary, additional, 3D mockups) and demo videos with accessibility compliance including ALT text and captions.

inScope: Access to Media Update Section via Edit Product
Demo Video Updates (file upload and YouTube/Vimeo embed)
outOfScope: Admin-specific features (audit logging, version history, rollback)

prerequisites: Valid AP account with approved status
Existing products with media in Product Management

testCases.title: Verify Edit Product option access from Vendor Product Management page
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Access to Media Update Section
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP with existing products
steps: Locate a product in the list
Click on 'Edit Product' option in action column
expectedResults: Product Management page loads with product list
Product is visible in the list

testCases.title: Verify media gallery view displays all previously uploaded images and videos
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Access to Media Update Section
testCases.preconditions: User is on Edit Product form for a product with existing media
steps: Open Edit Product for a product with images and videos
Verify gallery view displays all uploaded images
expectedResults: All previously uploaded images are visible in gallery view
Demo video is visible with playback controls
testCases.postconditions: All media is displayed in clear gallery view

testCases.title: Verify primary image is clearly marked as 'Primary'
testCases.preconditions: User is on Edit Product form with existing images
steps: Open Edit Product for a product with multiple images
Verify 'Primary' label or indicator is visible
testCases.postconditions: Primary image is clearly distinguished from other images

testCases.title: Verify AP can replace current primary image with a new one
testCases.preconditions: User is on Edit Product form with existing primary image
steps: Click on replace/upload option for primary image
Verify new image is set as primary
expectedResults: Replace option is available for primary image
New image displays as primary with 'Primary' label
testCases.postconditions: Primary image is replaced with new image

testCases.title: Verify AP can reassign another image as primary
testCases.preconditions: User is on Edit Product form with multiple images
steps: Navigate to Media section with multiple images
Click 'Set as Primary' or similar option
Verify the selected image becomes primary
expectedResults: Set as Primary option is available
Selected image now shows 'Primary' label, previous primary loses the label

testCases.title: Verify primary image update reflects in product card preview
testCases.preconditions: User has changed the primary image
steps: Change the primary image (replace or reassign)
Verify product card preview shows the new primary image
expectedResults: Product card preview displays the new primary image
testCases.postconditions: Primary image change is reflected in preview

testCases.title: Verify AP can upload up to 5 additional product images
testCases.preconditions: User is on Edit Product form
steps: Verify all 5 images are uploaded successfully
Verify previews are displayed for all images
expectedResults: Preview thumbnails are displayed for all uploaded images

testCases.title: Verify system prevents uploading more than 5 additional images
testCases.preconditions: User has already uploaded 5 additional images
expectedResults: Upload button is disabled or shows limit reached
Error message indicates maximum limit reached

testCases.title: Verify supported image formats (JPG, PNG) are accepted
testCases.preconditions: User is on Edit Product form

testCases.title: Verify AP can reorder additional images
testCases.preconditions: User has uploaded multiple additional images
steps: Drag and drop to reorder images

testCases.title: Verify AP can replace an additional image
testCases.preconditions: User has uploaded additional images
expectedResults: Old image is replaced with new one

testCases.title: Verify AP can delete an additional image
testCases.preconditions: User has uploaded additional images

testCases.title: Verify AP can upload up to 3 3D Mockup images
testCases.preconditions: User is on Edit Product form

testCases.title: Verify system prevents uploading more than 3 3D Mockup images
testCases.preconditions: User has uploaded 3 3D mockup images
expectedResults: Upload button is disabled or shows limit reached
Error message indicates maximum limit reached
testCases.postconditions: System enforces 3 image limit for 3D mockups

testCases.title: Verify AP can update demo video by uploading new video file
testCases.preconditions: User is on Edit Product form
expectedResults: Video is uploaded and preview is available

testCases.title: Verify AP can update demo video by embedding YouTube link
testCases.preconditions: User is on Edit Product form

testCases.title: Verify AP can update demo video by embedding Vimeo link
testCases.preconditions: User is on Edit Product form

testCases.title: Verify AP can preview video before finalizing
testCases.preconditions: User has uploaded or embedded a video
steps: Upload or embed a demo video
Verify video plays in preview mode

testCases.title: Verify AP is required to add ALT text for uploaded images
testCases.preconditions: User is uploading an image
steps: Attempt to save without ALT text
Verify system prompts for ALT text
expectedResults: Save is blocked without ALT text
testCases.postconditions: ALT text is mandatory for images

testCases.title: Verify 'Generate ALT Text with GenAI' option is available
testCases.preconditions: User is on image upload with missing ALT text
steps: Upload an image without ALT text
Verify 'Generate ALT Text with GenAI' button is visible
testCases.postconditions: GenAI ALT text option is functional

testCases.title: Verify 'Preview Media' option shows PwD-facing product details view
testCases.preconditions: User has updated media (images and video)
steps: Verify preview displays gallery/carousel for additional images
Verify preview displays video player with captions
expectedResults: Video player with playback controls and captions is visible

testCases.title: Verify Save Changes validates mandatory accessibility elements
testCases.preconditions: User has updated media with missing ALT text
steps: Verify system validates ALT text requirement
Verify save is blocked until ALT text is added
expectedResults: Images are updated without ALT text
Validation error appears for missing ALT text
Save is blocked until ALT text is provided

testCases.title: Verify confirmation message after successful media save
testCases.preconditions: User has updated media with all required fields
steps: Update media with ALT text and captions
expectedResults: Media is updated with all required fields
Confirmation message: 'Your media updates have been submitted and will be visible after admin approval.'
testCases.postconditions: User is informed of successful submission

testCases.title: Verify product moves to Pending Review status after media update
testCases.preconditions: User has saved media updates
testCases.postconditions: Product is in Pending Review status

testCases.title: Verify image file size limit (≤5MB) is enforced
testCases.preconditions: User is uploading an image
steps: Attempt to upload an image larger than 5MB

testCases.title: Verify upload progress bar is displayed during upload
testCases.preconditions: User is uploading a file
steps: Start uploading an image or video
expectedResults: Progress bar or percentage indicator is displayed

testCases.title: Verify upload status indicator shows completion
testCases.preconditions: User is uploading a file
expectedResults: Success indicator (checkmark, green status) is displayed

testCases.title: Verify system prevents upload of unsupported image formats
testCases.preconditions: User is uploading an image
steps: Attempt to upload an unsupported image format (e.g., GIF, BMP, TIFF)

testCases.title: Verify AP can retry uploads without losing previously added media
testCases.preconditions: User has uploaded some media and one upload fails
steps: Attempt to upload an invalid file (fails)
Verify previously uploaded images are retained
testCases.postconditions: Failed uploads don't affect existing media

testCases.title: Verify all media controls are keyboard accessible
testCases.preconditions: User is on media management interface
steps: Navigate to media section using Tab key
Verify all controls are reachable via keyboard
expectedResults: Upload button is keyboard focusable and activatable
All controls can be operated without mouse
testCases.postconditions: Media interface is fully keyboard accessible

testCases.title: Verify high contrast and focus indicators are visible
testCases.preconditions: User is on media management interface
steps: Navigate through media controls using keyboard
Observe focus indicators on each element
expectedResults: Focus indicators are clearly visible on focused elements
High contrast is maintained for all controls
testCases.postconditions: Focus indicators and contrast meet WCAG 2.1 AA

testCases.title: Verify tooltips explain how to write effective ALT text
testCases.preconditions: User is on ALT text input field
steps: Hover over help icon or tooltip trigger
Verify tooltip explains ALT text best practices
expectedResults: Tooltip provides guidance on writing effective ALT text

testCases.title: Verify invalid YouTube URL is rejected
testCases.preconditions: User is embedding a video

testCases.title: Verify empty ALT text field shows validation error on save
testCases.preconditions: User has uploaded images without ALT text
steps: Upload images without entering ALT text
Verify validation error for missing ALT text
expectedResults: Images are uploaded without ALT text
Validation error highlights missing ALT text fields

testCases.title: Verify deleting primary image prompts for new primary selection
testCases.preconditions: User has multiple images with one marked as primary
steps: Navigate to media section with multiple images
Verify system prompts to select new primary
expectedResults: System prompts to select new primary or auto-assigns
